arts.ttl: Ex-Liverpool goalkeeper Loris Karius tries to reboot career at struggling Schalke
arts.sum: More than six years after a disastrous Champions League final sent his career spiraling downward, former Liverpool goalkeeper Loris Karius is seeking a new start at a storied German club that’s facing its own problems. Karius has signed a contract until the end of the season, Schalke said, but he isn’t guaranteed to play.

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer news: Mikel Arteta's side to sign £51m midfielder 'next summer' as Liverpool, Man City suffer crushing blow
arts.sum: Arsenal will reportedly complete the signing of Real Sociedad midfielder Martin Zubimendi at the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Sources: Arsenal lead Liverpool in Zubimendi race
arts.sum: Arsenal have moved ahead of Liverpool in the race to sign Martin Zubimendi after entering into advanced talks with Real Sociedad to land the midfielder, sources have told ESPN.

arts.ttl: Arsenal ‘pursuing’ deal for Liverpool and Man City transfer target
arts.sum: Arsenal are reportedly working on a deal to sign Real Sociedad midfielder Martin Zubimendi in the summer transfer window. The Spain international rejected a move to Liverpool last year to stay in San Sebastian, while Manchester City and Real Madrid were also linked with the player. The Gunners have been “pursuing” a move for the […] The post Arsenal ‘pursuing’ deal for Liverpool and Man City transfer target first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Martin Zubimendi set to complete Premier League transfer just six months after rejecting Liverpool
arts.sum: Former Liverpool transfer target Martin Zubimendi is reportedly on the verge of completing a move to Arsenal - though he will finish the season with Real Sociedad

arts.ttl: Liverpool drop four team news hints before huge Nottingham Forest Premier League clash
arts.sum: Liverpool could open up a nine-point gap at the top of the Premier League table if they win at Nottingham Forest on Tuesday

arts.ttl: Rejected: Liverpool were convinced they would sign Arsenal-bound star
arts.sum: Liverpool were reportedly sure they would sign Martin Zubimendi last summer, only for the Real Sociedad midfielder to turn them down as he now prepares to join Arsenal. arts.ttl: Arsenal set to beat Liverpool, Man City & Real Madrid to £51m midfielder
arts.sum: Arsenal are expected to win the competitive race to sign Real Sociedad midfielder Martin Zubimendi.
